languages.text: {n}Вы переоценили и себя, и Себериана. Он не успевает парировать ваш удар... а вы не успеваете вовремя отвести оружие. С чавкающим звуком оно впивается в оголенный участок живой плоти на его лице. Себериан безмолвно оседает наземь. Град выстрелов, которыми вас награждает его свита, за пару мгновений оставляет от вас лишь груду окровавленных обрывков плоти.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вы переоценили и себя, и Себериана. Он не успевает парировать ваш удар... а вы не успеваете вовремя отвести оружие. С чавкающим звуком оно впивается в оголенный участок живой плоти на его лице. Себериан безмолвно оседает наземь. Град выстрелов, которыми вас награждает его свита, за пару мгновений оставляет от вас лишь груду окровавленных обрывков плоти.{/n}

languages.text: {n}You overestimated both yourself and Seberian. He cannot parry your strike in time... and you fail to draw back your weapon in time. It slams into the bared patch of living flesh on his face with a squelch. Seberian falls wordlessly to the ground. The hail of gunfire his retinue bestows upon you turns you into a pile of bloody scraps of flesh in a matter of moments.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你高估了自己，也高估了塞贝里安。他未能及时招架你的攻击……而你也未能及时收手。你的武器狠狠砸进他脸上裸露的血肉，发出黏腻的闷响。塞贝里安无声倒地。紧接着，随从们倾泻而出的枪林弹雨，在数秒之间就将你轰成了一堆血肉残渣。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You overestimated both yourself and Seberian. He cannot parry your strike in time... and you fail to draw back your weapon in time. It slams into the bared patch of living flesh on his face with a squelch. Seberian falls wordlessly to the ground. The hail of gunfire his retinue bestows upon you turns you into a pile of bloody scraps of flesh in a matter of moments.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你高估了自己，也高估了塞贝里安。他未能及时招架你的攻击……而你也未能及时收手。你的武器狠狠砸进他脸上裸露的血肉，发出黏腻的闷响。塞贝里安无声倒地。紧接着，随从们倾泻而出的枪林弹雨，在数秒之间就将你轰成了一堆血肉残渣。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous avez surestimé vos forces, mais aussi celles de Seberian. Il ne parvient pas à parer votre coup à temps... et vous ne retirez pas votre arme suffisamment vite. Elle entre en contact avec le peu de chair vivante qu'il lui reste sur le visage, dans un claquement mou, et Seberian s'écroule à terre, sans un mot. Il ne faut que quelques secondes à son entourage pour vous noyer sous les balles et vous réduire en charpie.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You overestimated both yourself and Seberian. He cannot parry your strike in time... and you fail to draw back your weapon in time. It slams into the bared patch of living flesh on his face with a squelch. Seberian falls wordlessly to the ground. The hail of gunfire his retinue bestows upon you turns you into a pile of bloody scraps of flesh in a matter of moments.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous avez surestimé vos forces, mais aussi celles de Seberian. Il ne parvient pas à parer votre coup à temps... et vous ne retirez pas votre arme suffisamment vite. Elle entre en contact avec le peu de chair vivante qu'il lui reste sur le visage, dans un claquement mou, et Seberian s'écroule à terre, sans un mot. Il ne faut que quelques secondes à son entourage pour vous noyer sous les balles et vous réduire en charpie.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Has sobrestimado las capacidades de Seberian y las tuyas propias. No logra parar tu golpe a tiempo, y tú tampoco logras abortar el ataque, que golpea la parte de su cara que sigue siendo de carne y hueso con un chapoteo. Seberian cae al suelo sin decir palabra. Su séquito reacciona al instante, haciendo jirones tu cuerpo con un torrente de disparos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You overestimated both yourself and Seberian. He cannot parry your strike in time... and you fail to draw back your weapon in time. It slams into the bared patch of living flesh on his face with a squelch. Seberian falls wordlessly to the ground. The hail of gunfire his retinue bestows upon you turns you into a pile of bloody scraps of flesh in a matter of moments.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Has sobrestimado las capacidades de Seberian y las tuyas propias. No logra parar tu golpe a tiempo, y tú tampoco logras abortar el ataque, que golpea la parte de su cara que sigue siendo de carne y hueso con un chapoteo. Seberian cae al suelo sin decir palabra. Su séquito reacciona al instante, haciendo jirones tu cuerpo con un torrente de disparos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Hem kendini hem de Seberian'ı gözünde fazla büyüttüğünü fark ediyorsun. Saldırını zamanında savuşturamıyor, sen de silahını zamanında geri çekemiyorsun. Silahın, ezilme sesinin eşliğiyle yüzündeki açıkta kalan et parçasına çarpıyor. Seberian sessizce yere yığılıyor. Maiyetinin üzerine yağdırdığı mermi yağmuru seni birkaç dakika içinde kanlı et parçalarından oluşan bir yığına çeviriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You overestimated both yourself and Seberian. He cannot parry your strike in time... and you fail to draw back your weapon in time. It slams into the bared patch of living flesh on his face with a squelch. Seberian falls wordlessly to the ground. The hail of gunfire his retinue bestows upon you turns you into a pile of bloody scraps of flesh in a matter of moments.{/n}

Silahın, ezilme sesinin eşliğiyle yüzündeki açıkta kalan et parçasına çarpıyor. Seberian sessizce yere yığılıyor. Maiyetinin üzerine yağdırdığı mermi yağmuru seni birkaç dakika içinde kanlı et parçalarından oluşan bir yığına çeviriyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du hast dich selbst und Seberian überschätzt. Er kann deinen Hieb nicht rechtzeitig parieren ... und du kannst deine Waffe nicht rechtzeitig zurückziehen. Sie dringt schmatzend in das lebendige Fleisch seines Gesichtes ein. Seberian fällt wortlos zu Boden. Sein Gefolge eröffnet das Feuer und verwandelt dich mit einem Hagel von Kugeln binnen Sekunden in einen blutigen Haufen Fleisch.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You overestimated both yourself and Seberian. He cannot parry your strike in time... and you fail to draw back your weapon in time. It slams into the bared patch of living flesh on his face with a squelch. Seberian falls wordlessly to the ground. The hail of gunfire his retinue bestows upon you turns you into a pile of bloody scraps of flesh in a matter of moments.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du hast dich selbst und Seberian überschätzt. Er kann deinen Hieb nicht rechtzeitig parieren ... und du kannst deine Waffe nicht rechtzeitig zurückziehen. Sie dringt schmatzend in das lebendige Fleisch seines Gesichtes ein. Seberian fällt wortlos zu Boden. Sein Gefolge eröffnet das Feuer und verwandelt dich mit einem Hagel von Kugeln binnen Sekunden in einen blutigen Haufen Fleisch.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたは自分とシベリア人を過大評価した。彼はあなたの攻撃をかわすことができない…そしてあなたは自分の武器をかわすことができない。あなたの武器は彼の顔の露出した肉に当たって、ぐしゃぐしゃと音を立てた。シベリア人は言葉もなく地面に倒れた。彼の側近があなたに浴びせた銃弾の雨は、あなたを数秒で血まみれの肉片{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You overestimated both yourself and Seberian. He cannot parry your strike in time... and you fail to draw back your weapon in time. It slams into the bared patch of living flesh on his face with a squelch. Seberian falls wordlessly to the ground. The hail of gunfire his retinue bestows upon you turns you into a pile of bloody scraps of flesh in a matter of moments.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたは自分とシベリア人を過大評価した。彼はあなたの攻撃をかわすことができない…そしてあなたは自分の武器をかわすことができない。あなたの武器は彼の顔の露出した肉に当たって、ぐしゃぐしゃと音を立てた。シベリア人は言葉もなく地面に倒れた。彼の側近があなたに浴びせた銃弾の雨は、あなたを数秒で血まみれの肉片{/n}
